=== DNS Records for dalletek.live ===
Add these to your domain DNS (via Namecheap or wherever dalletek.live is managed)

1. SPF Record (TXT record)
   Host: @
   Value: v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ip4:167.235.183.179 ~all

2. DKIM Record (TXT record)
   Host: mail._domainkey
   Value: v=DKIM1; h=sha256; k=rsa; 

3. DMARC Record (TXT record)
   Host: _dmarc
   Value: v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; sp=quarantine; rua=mailto:postmaster@dalletek.live; ruf=mailto:postmaster@dalletek.live; pct=100

4. MX Record (not strictly needed but good practice)
   Host: @
   Value: ASPMX.L.GOOGLE.com
   Priority: 10

5. PTR / rDNS (via Hetzner Robot panel)
   IP: 167.235.183.179 → mail.dalletek.live

=== After ports 25/465 are unblocked ===
Run: postconf -e 'relayhost =' && systemctl restart postfix
This removes the Gmail relay, sends directly from server.
